title: REALIKE Metallic Marker Pens Compatible with Cricut Joy pack set of 12 Pens 1.0 Medium Point Metallic Permanent Pens for Drawing Writing Calligraphy
features: REALIKE Metallic Markers perfectly work for Cricut Joy machine, gets beautiful results with drawing and writing for every projects.
1.0 medium tips permanent markers provides writing smoothly, and result in good color, ideal for black paper, arts and crafts, DIY projects, scrapbooks and more.

Set of 12 markers pens in 12 vivid metallic primary colors including green , red , purple , silver, gold and more which helps you adding sparkle and embellishment to various craft work, such as make greeting cards, invitations, journals and scrapbooks, labels and decals extra special.
Pens are water-based , nontoxic, and permanent after dry for ease of use and pace of mind. Note: Please keep the lid of pens in covering when you are not in use.
Widely apply for most surface with these metallic markers pens, like paper, rock, plastic, fabric, ceramic, glass, wood and more, but best result in dark surfaces.
description: Product Description Metallic Markers are compatible with REALIKE Metallic Markers are compatible with Cricut joy/ X tra, help you to get the perfect drawing and writing tool for every project. 1.0 medium tips permanent markers provides writing smoothly, and result in good color, ideal for black paper, arts and crafts, DIY projects, scrapbooks and more. DID YOUR CREATIVE smoothly writting The ink in pens for drawing markers becomes permanent once dry. Water-based and smoothly writing tips do not damage the paper, giving you tick and saturated lines every time. Creative More Use these medium tips marker pens to add a metallic shine to all your creation. ideal for beautiful party invitations, birthday bash decorations. Setting metallic shines to vinyl ,paper crafts, labels and more. Widely Apply Widely apply for most surface with metallic markers pens: black paper, rock, plastic, fabric , metal and wood, ceramic, glass and more. Specially excellent result in dark surfaces. Vibrant colors with all the primary colors Amazing color selection are available in set, Have rich color choices to create beautiful, variety crafts to fit difference occasion, style and mood. 12 PRIMARY COLORS Metallic permanent markers give an beautiful result for the artistic to create any of projects, and the pens are completely compatible with Cricut use. Available in 12 primary colors to infuse metallic shine to all your crafts projects.
